name: without --project the project scoping fields are empty/null so unscoped profiles are back-compatible
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(d["project_id"].nil? && d["project_overlay_namespaces"]==[] && d["families_active"]==[] ? 0:1)' && echo unscoped-fields-empty 1>&2
